class.name: Autowork
class.experimental: Some methods may not be implemented and may be changed in future versions.
class.description:
The Autowork class provides a native unit testing framework for Blazium Engine. It allows developers to define, collect, and execute tests directly within the engine using scripts.
It supports common testing features such as assertions, filtering tests, and tracking results (pass, fail, pending). Additionally, it includes utilities for mocking and observing behavior through components like spies, stubbers, and doublers.
Tests can be automatically discovered from directories or explicitly added scripts. Once configured, the framework can execute all collected tests and provide detailed statistics and logging.

method.name: add_directory
method.description:
Adds a directory to be scanned for test scripts.
All scripts in the given [param path] are evaluated and included if they match the configured naming rules. The optional [param prefix] and [param suffix] parameters can be used to override the default naming convention for test discovery. If [param prefix] or [param suffix] are empty, the globally configured defaults are used instead.

method.name: add_script
method.description: Adds a single script file to the test suite. The script located at [param path] is parsed and any test cases defined within it are registered for execution.

method.name: get_assert_count
method.description: Returns the total number of assertions executed across all tests.

method.name: get_doubler
method.description: Returns the [AutoworkDoubler] instance used for creating test doubles.

method.name: get_fail_count
method.description: Returns the number of tests that have failed.

method.name: get_logger
method.description: Returns the [AutoworkLogger] instance used by the framework.

method.name: get_pass_count
method.description: Returns the number of tests that have passed successfully.

method.name: get_pending_count
method.description: Returns the number of tests that are marked as pending.

method.name: get_spy
method.description: Returns the [AutoworkSpy] instance used for observing function calls.

method.name: get_stubber
method.description: Returns the [AutoworkStubber] instance used for defining stubbed behavior.

method.name: get_test_collector
method.description: Returns the [AutoworkCollector] responsible for managing discovered tests.

method.name: get_test_count
method.description: Returns the total number of tests collected.

method.name: get_test_script_count
method.description: Returns the number of scripts that contain tests.

method.name: set_test
method.description: Sets a filter pattern to determine which tests should be executed.
